title: HDR Image
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a Radiance HDR (RGBE) image, a high dynamic range format commonly used in lighting and environment map workflows. HDR files store floating-point luminance values using a shared exponent encoding.

## When to use
Use `media:hdr;image` when a node produces or consumes Radiance HDR environment maps or HDR photographs, particularly in 3D rendering or image-based lighting (IBL) pipelines. For higher-fidelity HDR needs, prefer [OpenEXR Image](https://capdag.com/browse/media:exr;image).

## Notes
Radiance HDR uses a lossy RGBE encoding that trades precision for compact file size compared to full floating-point formats like OpenEXR. HDR images require tone mapping before display on standard dynamic range monitors.
